parameters.query:
SELECT 
    m.user_id,
    m.fullname,
    m.contact,
    m.username,
    pl.nombre AS plan_nombre,
    DATE_FORMAT(
        DATE_ADD(COALESCE(p.start_date, p.paid_date), INTERVAL pl.duracion_dias DAY),
        '%d/%m/%Y'
    ) AS fecha_vencimiento,
    DATEDIFF(
        DATE_ADD(COALESCE(p.start_date, p.paid_date), INTERVAL pl.duracion_dias DAY),
        CURDATE()
    ) AS dias_restantes
FROM members m
INNER JOIN payments p ON p.id = (
    SELECT p2.id FROM payments p2
    WHERE p2.user_id = m.user_id 
      AND p2.status = 'pagado' 
      AND p2.plan_id IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY p2.id DESC LIMIT 1
)
INNER JOIN planes pl ON pl.id = p.plan_id
HAVING dias_restantes  BETWEEN -9999 AND 5
ORDER BY dias_restantes ASC;

parameters.content: Cron para avisar vencimientos al administrador a las 8:00 pm
Flujo Automatizado de Confirmación de Pagos con Notificaciones Multicanal

parameters.query: SELECT m.user_id, m.fullname, m.correo, m.contact, COUNT(p.id) AS total_pagos, MAX(p.paid_date) AS ultimo_pago, DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), MAX(p.paid_date)) AS dias_sin_pago, CASE WHEN COUNT(p.id) = 1 AND DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), MAX(p.paid_date)) > 25 THEN 90 WHEN COUNT(p.id) = 1 AND DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), MAX(p.paid_date)) > 20 THEN 70 WHEN COUNT(p.id) >= 2 AND DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), MAX(p.paid_date)) > 35 THEN 80 WHEN COUNT(p.id) >= 2 AND DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), MAX(p.paid_date)) > 25 THEN 50 ELSE 10 END AS riesgo FROM members m LEFT JOIN payments p ON p.user_id = m.user_id AND p.status = 'pagado' GROUP BY m.user_id HAVING riesgo >= 50 ORDER BY riesgo DESC;

parameters.content:
DETECCIÓN DE ABANDONO DIARIO
Se ejecuta cada día a las 9:00am
- Detecta clientes en riesgo (score 50-100)
- Alerta al admin por Telegram + Inbox
- Envía email de reactivación a clientes críticos (riesgo ≥70)

parameters.query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS ingresos_semana FROM payments WHERE status = 'pagado' AND paid_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(CURDATE()) DAY);

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS ingresos_anterior FROM payments WHERE status = 'pagado' AND paid_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL (WEEKDAY(CURDATE()) + 7) DAY) AND paid_date < DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(CURDATE()) DAY);
SELECT COUNT(*) AS nuevos FROM members WHERE dor >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(CURDATE()) DAY);

SELECT COUNT(*) AS activas FROM members m INNER JOIN payments p ON p.id = (SELECT p2.id FROM payments p2 WHERE p2.user_id = m.user_id AND p2.status = 'pagado' AND p2.plan_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p2.id DESC LIMIT 1) INNER JOIN planes pl ON pl.id = p.plan_id WHERE DATE_ADD(COALESCE(p.start_date, p.paid_date), INTERVAL pl.duracion_dias DAY) >= CURDATE();

SELECT COUNT(*) AS por_vencer FROM members m INNER JOIN payments p ON p.id = (SELECT p2.id FROM payments p2 WHERE p2.user_id = m.user_id AND p2.status = 'pagado' AND p2.plan_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p2.id DESC LIMIT 1) INNER JOIN planes pl ON pl.id = p.plan_id WHERE DATEDIFF(DATE_ADD(COALESCE(p.start_date, p.paid_date), INTERVAL pl.duracion_dias DAY), CURDATE()) BETWEEN 0 AND 7;

SELECT pl.nombre, COUNT(*) AS ventas FROM payments p INNER JOIN planes pl ON pl.id = p.plan_id WHERE p.status = 'pagado' AND p.paid_date >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01') GROUP BY p.plan_id ORDER BY ventas DESC LIMIT 3;

parameters.content:
REPORTE SEMANAL AUTOMÁTICO
Se ejecuta cada lunes a las 8:00am
Envía resumen por Telegram + Email + Inbox

parameters.query: SELECT m.user_id, m.fullname, m.correo, m.contact, COUNT(p.id) AS total_pagos, DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), MAX(p.paid_date)) AS dias_sin_pago, CASE WHEN COUNT(p.id) >= 4 AND DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), MAX(p.paid_date)) <= 35 THEN 'VIP' WHEN COUNT(p.id) BETWEEN 2 AND 3 AND DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), MAX(p.paid_date)) <= 40 THEN 'Regular' WHEN COUNT(p.id) = 1 AND DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), MAX(p.paid_date)) <= 35 THEN 'Nuevo' WHEN DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), MAX(p.paid_date)) BETWEEN 36 AND 90 THEN 'Dormido' WHEN DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), MAX(p.paid_date)) > 90 THEN 'Perdido' WHEN MAX(p.paid_date) IS NULL THEN 'Sin_pagos' ELSE 'Regular' END AS segmento FROM members m LEFT JOIN payments p ON p.user_id = m.user_id AND p.status = 'pagado' GROUP BY m.user_id ORDER BY segmento;

parameters.content:
SEGMENTACIÓN SEMANAL
Se ejecuta cada lunes a las 8:30am (después del reporte)
Clasifica: VIP, Regular, Nuevo, Dormido, Perdido
Envía resumen por Telegram + Inbox
